name: Eusignius
troparia: (Tone 4) Faithful, let us celebrate in advance the joy of Christ’s Transfiguration!* Let us rejoice and cry out in the prefeast:* The day of heavenly joy is approaching,* for the Lord is ascending Mount Tabor* where He shines with the light of His Divinity!
kontakia: (Tone 4) Today all mortal nature radiates divinity* at the divine Transfiguration* and cries out with gladness:* Christ is transfigured, saving all.
